expectations.text: Proposes covering multiple fitness capacities, not just barbell strength
expectations.evidence: Covers Strength, Power, Speed/Agility, Muscular Endurance, Aerobic Capacity, and Movement Quality.
Includes '2-Mile Run (or 3K run)' and rowing alternative.
Includes '40-Yard Dash' and '5-10-5 Shuttle' for speed and agility.
Includes Vertical Jump, Broad Jump, and Medicine Ball Chest Pass.
Includes Overhead Squat Assessment for mobility/stability.

expectations.text: Suggests this full battery may be better as a less frequent check rather than every 12 weeks
expectations.evidence: Recommends quarterly (12-week) testing throughout. Does not suggest less frequent scheduling.
